since_last: 33% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.82%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC +0.22% · Gold -0.92% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 33% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.82%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.82%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +8.83%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +8.83%, PLTR +1.18%, MDB +1.16%, NOW +1.12%, MSFT +0.78%. Laggards: EQIX -5.64%, MU -3.33%, MRVL -2.45%, CRNC -2.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.26% at $171.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.26% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
